files.responsibility: Compatibility import surface for the focused classical-Kuramoto modules shipped by oscillatools.
files.dependency_boundary: Imports the package version and re-exports the oscillatools.accel surface; downstream examples, SCPN modules, and external clients consume these stable aliases.
files.reassess_when: Executable numerical logic moves into this package initializer instead of a focused accel module.

files.responsibility: Stable multi-language acceleration import surface over focused Kuramoto implementation modules.
files.dependency_boundary: Re-exports the focused oscillatools.accel modules and NumPy-facing dispatcher contracts; legacy and package-root consumers depend on the aliases, while compute bodies stay in leaves.
files.reassess_when: A compute kernel or backend lifecycle is implemented directly in the initializer.

files.responsibility: Lazy juliacall adapter for the bundled Julia acceleration tier and its typed array conversions.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends on NumPy, optional juliacall, and bundled Julia sources; focused oscillatools acceleration leaves call this adapter and own the public numerical APIs.
files.reassess_when: A second runtime, independent lifecycle, or non-Julia numerical implementation is added.

files.responsibility: Dimension-generic matrix and vector value, JVP, VJP, and gradient kernels for compiler AD.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends only on the parent checked-vector validator; compiler_ad::kernels re-exports the complete family to PyO3 bindings, with unit tests colocated below the implementation.
files.reassess_when: A kernel family with different dimension policy or validation lifecycle is added.

files.responsibility: Fixed-size 2x2 determinant, inverse, solve, Cholesky, and spectral compiler-AD kernels.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends only on the parent fixed-vector validator; compiler_ad::kernels re-exports the complete 2x2 family to bindings, with geometry helpers and unit tests kept local.
files.reassess_when: A non-2x2 operand class or independently versioned numerical policy is added.

files.responsibility: Kuramoto coupling-force, stability-Jacobian, interaction-energy, local-field, Sakaguchi, Daido, and triadic kernel family.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends on ndarray, NumPy/PyO3 conversion, and the shared phase-vector validator; lib.rs registers all wrappers, kuramoto_autodiff uses the networked inner kernel, and family unit tests are colocated.
files.reassess_when: Non-coupling observables, trajectory integration, or an independent backend lifecycle enters the module.

files.responsibility: Kuramoto order-parameter, mean-phase, and Daido observable values with analytic gradients and Hessians.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends on ndarray, NumPy/PyO3 conversion, and the shared phase-vector validator; lib.rs registers wrappers and Kuramoto kernels/benchmarks consume the pure inner functions; unit tests are colocated.
files.reassess_when: A non-observable solver or unrelated statistical lifecycle is added.

files.responsibility: Stochastic parameter-shift, SPSA, score-function, and confidence-interval gradient uncertainty kernel family.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends on ndarray and NumPy/PyO3 conversion; lib.rs exposes the four bindings, hot-path benchmarks consume inner kernels, and validation/unit tests remain colocated.
files.reassess_when: A deterministic optimizer, training loop, or independently configured sampling engine is added.

files.responsibility: Single command-line audit that assembles K_nm parity and measured-system validation evidence.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends on the K_nm Hamiltonian bridge, NumPy, subprocess tool probes, and JSON/filesystem output; no production module imports the script.
files.reassess_when: Reusable library logic or a second command lifecycle is added instead of extracted.

files.responsibility: Package-root compatibility facade and lazy public export registry.
files.dependency_boundary: Lazily resolves the package's focused application, compiler, control, differentiable, hardware, phase, QEC, and utility leaves; examples, tests, and external callers consume the stable root aliases.
files.reassess_when: Algorithmic execution or stateful backend ownership moves into the initializer.

files.responsibility: External differentiable-framework comparison execution facade after contract extraction.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends on the external-contract and Catalyst leaves plus JAX, Torch, TensorFlow, PennyLane, Qiskit, and Phase-QNode adapters; benchmark scripts and focused edge tests consume and monkeypatch its runner seams.
files.reassess_when: A runner gains an independent public API or dependency injection replaces the shared facade seams.

files.responsibility: Differentiable-programming conformance case orchestration after contract and quantum-case extraction.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends on benchmark contracts, quantum cases, MLIR, native differentiable APIs, and JAX/Torch bridges; benchmark reports and focused edge tests consume and monkeypatch its stable availability/compiler seams.
files.reassess_when: A case family becomes independently consumed or a public dependency-injection contract replaces facade globals.

files.responsibility: Immutable Enzyme/MLIR evidence schema, maturity aggregation, rendering, and artifact writing lifecycle.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends on the Phase-QNode affinity benchmark record; compiler.mlir and the evidence-writer script consume the complete record family.
files.reassess_when: An evidence subtype gains independent versioning, persistence, or consumers.

files.responsibility: Closed-form 2x2 dense and symmetric matrix native LLVM/JIT lowering family.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends on MLIR records, executable kernels, native primitives, and differentiable contracts; compiler.mlir is the sole production facade and owns public dispatch.
files.reassess_when: A non-2x2 operand class, separate backend, or independently consumed lowering API is added.

files.responsibility: Dimension-generic vector and matrix native LLVM/JIT lowering family.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends on MLIR records, executable kernels, native primitives, and differentiable contracts; compiler.mlir is the sole production facade and owns public dispatch.
files.reassess_when: A distinct operand policy, backend lifecycle, or independently consumed lowering API appears.

files.responsibility: LLVM text emission for recorded whole-program AD operations and derivatives.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends on whole-program differentiable result types; mlir_whole_program_native is the sole production importer and owns driver, cache, and executable lifecycles.
files.reassess_when: An independently consumed lowering family or second backend is introduced.

files.responsibility: Whole-program AD MLIR/native compilation, executable-kernel, cache, and lowering-analysis pipeline.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends on MLIR records/native primitives, the dedicated emitter, and whole-program differentiable results; compiler.mlir and native-execution evidence consume the pipeline.
files.reassess_when: Cache, execution, or lowering analysis gains an independent public lifecycle.

files.responsibility: Finite-difference and complex-step diagnostic gradient, Jacobian, JVP, VJP, Hessian, HVP, value, and batch transform family.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends on differentiable parameter/result contracts and shared batch/transform helpers; differentiable facades, optimizers, algebra audits, and dedicated tests consume the transform family.
files.reassess_when: A non-diagnostic AD method or independently versioned transform backend enters the module.

files.responsibility: Static registry and filesystem audit for differentiable module ownership, coverage, typing, docs, and wiring status.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends only on dataclasses, paths, and typed collections; hardening and Rust/Python inventory tests consume its registry and audit result.
files.reassess_when: It begins executing benchmarks, compiler transforms, or another independent audit lifecycle.

files.responsibility: Canonical immutable derivative-result schema registry and shared validation helpers.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends on parameter and stochastic-policy contracts; twenty differentiable algorithm, facade, and report modules consume the stable record identities.
files.reassess_when: A domain requires independent schema versioning, persistence, or lifecycle ownership.

files.responsibility: Phase package compatibility facade and public re-export registry.
files.dependency_boundary: Re-exports focused phase solver, gradient, framework bridge, QNode, objective, audit, and training leaves; package clients and tests consume the stable phase aliases.
files.reassess_when: Executable solver or bridge logic is implemented directly in the initializer.

files.responsibility: Registered Phase-QNode statevector execution, PyTree transforms, PMAP sharding, and AOT/export JAX route family.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends one-way on JAX contracts, gradient helpers, and QNode circuit declarations; jax_bridge, compatibility, maturity, and direct tests consume the complete transform leaf.
files.reassess_when: Non-QNode compatibility/training or independent cloud evidence moves into the leaf.

files.responsibility: Parameter-shift gradient planning and execution for phase and Kuramoto-XY VQE objectives.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends on differentiable primitives, classical hardware support, gradient backend contracts, and Phase VQE; audits, training, provider-gradient, QNode, and benchmark modules consume it.
files.reassess_when: A different gradient method or independent training lifecycle is added.

files.responsibility: Immutable Qiskit gradient, Runtime, provider-workflow, evidence-bundle, and maturity contract graph.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends on NumPy and Qiskit value types but no local execution module; qiskit_bridge, qiskit_gradients, qiskit_runtime, and direct contract tests consume the exact records and validators.
files.reassess_when: A contract family needs independent versioning or an execution lifecycle enters the leaf.

files.responsibility: Reverse-mode adjoint contribution generation and dispatch over the stabilised whole-program AD IR.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends on adjoint/effect IR plus cumulative, interpolation, linalg, signal, stencil, and whole-program result leaves; differentiable and whole-program facades plus dedicated tests consume the private pipeline.
files.reassess_when: A second reverse engine or independently consumed primitive dispatcher appears.

files.responsibility: Immutable Program-AD alias-set, lattice, unknown-edge, and provenance contract graph.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends on effect-IR and frontend contract types; program_ad_alias_analysis is the sole production importer and re-exports the record identities.
files.reassess_when: A schema family needs independent versioning or analysis execution enters the contract leaf.

files.responsibility: Static array-indexing derivative rules and registry dispatch contracts.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends on parameter and registry contracts; Program-AD primitive families, trace values, differentiable facades, and dedicated tests consume the indexing rules.
files.reassess_when: A non-indexing primitive family or independently dispatched backend is added.

files.responsibility: Program-AD stack, concatenate, block, broadcast, triangular, diagonal, and like-constructor assembly derivative family.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends on parameter/indexing/registry contracts and focused broadcast/stack assembly helpers; differentiable and trace-value facades plus assembly tests consume the rules.
files.reassess_when: A non-assembly primitive or independent dispatch lifecycle enters the module.

files.responsibility: Program-AD linear-algebra derivative rules, registry contracts, and conditioning diagnostics.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends on parameter/result/registry contracts plus indexing and shape-transform helpers; differentiable, adjoint, trace, finite-difference parity, and direct-rule tests consume the linalg family.
files.reassess_when: A separate backend, non-linalg primitive family, or independent conditioning service appears.

files.responsibility: Program-AD product and contraction derivative factories with registry contracts.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends on parameter/indexing/registry contracts and shape transforms; differentiable and trace-value facades plus product/parity tests consume the family.
files.reassess_when: A non-product primitive or independent contraction backend is added.

files.responsibility: Program-AD reduction derivative factories and registry contracts.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends on the registry and trapezoid reduction leaf; differentiable and trace-value facades plus reduction/parity tests consume the family.
files.reassess_when: A non-reduction primitive family or separate execution backend enters the module.

files.responsibility: Primitive identity, rule, transform, registration, dispatch-report, and coverage lifecycle for Program AD.
files.dependency_boundary: Dependency-free apart from NumPy and typed standard-library records; thirty-six compiler, differentiable, primitive, trace, and test modules consume the registry contracts.
files.reassess_when: A second registry lifecycle, persistence service, or backend-specific policy appears.

files.responsibility: Program-AD static selection, sort, where, and clip derivative rule family.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends on parameter/indexing/registry contracts and shape transforms; differentiable and trace-value facades plus selection/parity tests consume the family.
files.reassess_when: A non-selection primitive or independent selector backend is added.

files.responsibility: Static Program-AD reshape, axis, rank, repeat, tile, roll, rotation, and flip derivative rule family.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends on parameter/indexing/registry contracts and trace metadata; ten primitive, trace, differentiable, and direct test modules consume the shape rules.
files.reassess_when: A non-shape primitive or independently dispatched backend enters the module.

files.responsibility: Static source/bytecode inspection, semantic classification, digest, and frontend report assembly pipeline.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends one-way on whole_program_frontend_contracts; differentiable, whole-program runtime/result/API modules and direct tests consume the frontend and stable record re-exports.
files.reassess_when: Execution, lowering, or an independently consumed analysis lifecycle is added.

files.responsibility: Operator-intercepted forward-AD TraceADScalar and TraceADArray value/protocol runtime over registry-gated NumPy dispatch.
files.dependency_boundary: Depends one-way on parameter, registry, trace metadata/predicate/context, and focused array, assembly, cumulative, elementwise, interpolation, linalg, product, reduction, selection, shape, signal, and stencil primitive leaves; differentiable, vmap, and whole-program AD APIs consume the mutually recursive value classes, while six responsibility-specific test owners remain below the 1000-line threshold.
files.reassess_when: A non-value runtime lifecycle appears or class dispatch can be separated without cyclic imports.

files.responsibility: Canonical derivative-result schema identity, normalization, serialization, and fail-closed invariant tests.
files.dependency_boundary: Owns differentiable_result_contracts through package and differentiable facades, with stochastic-policy fixtures; no other test imports this test module.
files.reassess_when: The source contract registry splits into independently versioned schema lifecycles.

files.responsibility: Fixed-size dense 2x2 determinant, inverse, solve, eigenvalue, and eigensystem native-compilation integration family.
files.dependency_boundary: Owns compiler/mlir_matrix_2x2_native_compilation through the public compiler facade and Rust-engine parity mirror; shares only the typed eager-batching helper with sibling operand-class tests.
files.reassess_when: A non-2x2 operand class, separate backend lifecycle, or independently consumed fixture enters this test owner.

files.responsibility: Compiler-AD transform-plan construction, lowering-status, registry, fail-closed policy, and public export contract tests.
files.dependency_boundary: Owns the transform-plan lifecycle exposed by compiler.mlir and differentiable registry contracts; it does not import other test modules.
files.reassess_when: Transform planning splits into independently owned source lifecycles.

files.responsibility: Whole-program AD MLIR/native compilation, cache, lowering-boundary, selection, and executable-kernel integration tests.
files.dependency_boundary: Owns compiler/mlir_whole_program_native through the package/compiler facade and differentiable whole-program records; no test bucket imports it.
files.reassess_when: The source pipeline splits into independently consumed cache, driver, or execution lifecycles.

files.responsibility: Qiskit Runtime capture, provider workflow evidence, bundle freshness, maturity aggregation, and facade identity tests.
files.dependency_boundary: Owns phase/qiskit_runtime with its contracts, bridge aliases, provider-gradient, and hardware-audit collaborators; no unrelated framework lifecycle is tested.
files.reassess_when: Runtime capture, provider workflow, or maturity becomes an independently versioned source lifecycle.

files.responsibility: Reverse-adjoint contribution, primitive dispatch, provenance, and result-assembly tests.
files.dependency_boundary: Owns program_ad_adjoint_generation with effect IR and whole-program result fixtures; its cases exercise the same private dispatcher lifecycle.
files.reassess_when: The source adjoint engine splits into independently owned dispatch lifecycles.

files.responsibility: Program-AD alias/lattice/provenance contract docs, identity, and exhaustive validation-path tests.
files.dependency_boundary: Owns program_ad_alias_contracts through package and differentiable facade identities; execution analysis remains in the separate alias-effects test.
files.reassess_when: The source contract registry splits by independently versioned schema family.

files.responsibility: Program-AD alias/effect analysis execution and static-lattice report tests.
files.dependency_boundary: Owns the program_ad_alias_analysis execution lifecycle through the differentiable facade; immutable schema validation stays in the separate contract test.
files.reassess_when: The source analysis pipeline splits into independently consumed execution lifecycles.

files.responsibility: Primitive identity, rule, transform, registration, dispatch-report, facade, and coverage tests for Program AD.
files.dependency_boundary: Owns program_ad_registry through package and differentiable facades; all cases exercise the same registry lifecycle and shared helper graph.
files.reassess_when: The source registry splits into independently versioned or persisted lifecycles.

files.responsibility: Static Program-AD shape-transform rules, normalization, registry policy, direct adjoints, and failure-boundary tests.
files.dependency_boundary: Owns program_ad_shape_transforms through direct, package, and differentiable imports; all cases exercise the same primitive family.
files.reassess_when: The source shape family splits into independently dispatched modules.

files.responsibility: QPU data artifact schema, validation, provenance, hashing, persistence, and defensive-copy contract tests.
files.dependency_boundary: Owns bridge/qpu_data_artifact directly and has no unrelated source owner or test-module dependency.
files.reassess_when: The artifact schema and persistence lifecycle split into independently consumed source modules.
